title: 2026 U.S. Senate election in New Mexico
description: This race is for New Mexico’s Class II seat in the U.S. Senate. It matters because it is one of the Senate seats up in 2026 and will help determine control of the chamber, though current race ratings and the state’s recent voting history suggest Democrats have the advantage. The main contrast so far is between incumbent Sen. Ben Ray Luján, a well-known statewide Democrat, and primary challengers including Matt Dodson on the Democratic side and Larry Marker as a Republican write-in effort.
polling_note: No public polling found for this race as of 2026-04-01.

candidates.name: Ben Ray Luján
candidates.summary: Ben Ray Luján is the incumbent U.S. senator from New Mexico and is seeking reelection in 2026. He previously served in the U.S. House and has held other leadership roles in Congress, making him the best-known candidate in the race.

summary_sources.title: About Ben - Senator Ben Ray Luján
2026 United States Senate election in New Mexico

career_history.title: United States Senator
career_history.description: Serves as New Mexico’s junior senator.

candidates.name: Matt Dodson
candidates.summary: Matt Dodson is a Democratic primary challenger to Sen. Ben Ray Luján. Public descriptions identify him as a U.S. Air Force veteran and a democratic socialist; his campaign says it is focused on universal healthcare, opposition to corporate PAC money, and other progressive priorities.

career_history.title: U.S. Air Force veteran
career_history.description: Campaign and news coverage identify him as a veteran.

career_history.title: Landlord
career_history.description: News coverage described him as a landlord from Farmington.

career_history.title: Candidate for New Mexico state office
career_history.description: Previously ran for state legislative office, according to New Mexico Secretary of State election records.

candidates.name: Larry E. Marker
candidates.summary: Larry E. Marker is the Republican write-in candidate associated with the 2026 New Mexico Senate race. Available reporting describes him as a former oil and gas operator who was recruited to qualify as a write-in after the party did not have a standard ballot candidate.

career_history.title: Former oil and gas operator
career_history.description: Described in reporting as a former oil and gas operator.

candidates.name: Toby Smith
candidates.summary: Toby Smith is a third-party candidate listed for the general election in New Mexico’s 2026 Senate race. Ballotpedia lists him as the Jewish/Christian National Party nominee, but there is limited public information available about his background.
